sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ui_hp_publisher"> <sys_ui_hp_publisher action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <allow_database_view_filter>false</allow_database_view_filter> <allow_extended_table>false</allow_extended_table> <boolean_field/> <boolean_table/> <date_filter/> <default_boolean_field/> <default_choice/> <default_date_filter/> <default_reference_field_value/> <description>List input for Primary Assignee filter</description> <exclusion_choice_list/> <look_up_name>Filter: Primary Assignee</look_up_name> <name>Filter: Primary Assignee</name> <reference_conditions/> <reference_table>x_153465_discovert_discover_office_hierarchy</reference_table> <remove_all_option>false</remove_all_option> <source_field/> <source_table/> <sys_class_name>sys_ui_hp_publisher</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2019-08-17 03:18:46</sys_created_on> <sys_id>b46d66391bdf3b00888aebde6e4bcbbb</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>21</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Filter: Primary Assignee</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Tasker" source="x_153465_discovert">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Tasker">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_ui_hp_publisher_b46d66391bdf3b00888aebde6e4bcbbb</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>gmaldonado</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2021-11-01 15:39:46</sys_updated_on> <type>2</type> <ui_control_type>4</ui_control_type> </sys_ui_hp_publisher> </record_update>
